recommendations.name: Baccarat Rouge 540
recommendations.reasoning: The structured elegance of the outfit calls for a warm, luminous signature. Baccarat Rouge 540's crystalline amber and saffron accord mirrors the refined opulence of your look.

recommendations.name: Black Orchid
recommendations.reasoning: The deep tones in your palette align with this fragrance's dark floral complexity — a bold, commanding presence for a high-stakes occasion.

recommendations.name: Portrait of a Lady
recommendations.reasoning: For a softer interpretation of the look, this rose-centered oriental brings warmth and depth without overpowering the visual statement you're making.
